name: UserX
description: Mobile app UX analytics with session recordings, touch heatmaps, conversion funnels, crash analytics and user flow analysis for iOS and Android.

seo.title: UserX — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: UserX: Mobile app UX analytics with session recordings, touch heatmaps, conversion funnels, crash analytics and user flow analysis for iOS and Android.

when_to_use: Mobile session recordings with touch gesture heatmaps
Crash analytics correlated with user session replay
Conversion funnel analysis for iOS and Android apps
User flow visualization across mobile app screens

pros: Focused on mobile iOS and Android, not bolted-on
Touch heatmaps and gesture tracking native to mobile
Crash analytics integrated with session recordings
Funnel analysis tuned for mobile UX patterns
cons: Web coverage is limited or absent
Smaller brand vs Firebase and Mixpanel in mobile
SDK size and performance overhead to validate
review.verdict: Decent mobile-only UX analytics alternative to Firebase, worth evaluating if you need touch heatmaps and crash context.
review.best_for: Mobile product teams needing replay, heatmaps and crash data in one SDK.
review.not_for: Web-first products or teams standardized on Firebase analytics.
